title: Wano Prepares While the World Shakes
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Kinemon, Unknown person #5, Zoro, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Toki as The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
scene: The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Only one person in this country has ever been able to take enma...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: It was Kozuki Oden!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Try to cut that tree over there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sir Zoro, I will be blunt with you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it were me, I would not accept this blade.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He cut the whole cliff off!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: GyaAAAAHZOROURO's arm...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Give it back to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This sword will force its welder to release excessive amounts of Ryuuou...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And will cause unneces- Sally large strikes....!! If you were just some normal swordsman...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You would have had all your energy sucked out and collapsed immediately... well done.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you want to do? Do you want a different sword?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: No, I'll take it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Emma...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So what this means is...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once I've gotten used to this sword... I'll be even stronger?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What an amazing man...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Kapp!???!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Three days left until the raid..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: During my investigation- ton...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was able to find out that the beasts pirates' army is around 20,000 strong.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And Shogun Crochi will have around 10,000 men escort- ing him during the Shogun procession.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There will be 30,000 enemies on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We do not want to get the commoners involved, either. Not to mention the enemy's territory advantage.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even with the mansion blueprints, we are still at a disadvantage....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We have roughly 4,000 people.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We can rule-out a straight-up confronta-tion...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: All of you, get to fixing 'em!!

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: We don't have much time!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need these sturdy enough to carry 10,000 people, just to be safe!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There will not be that many...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You idiot!! There's nothing wrong with making sure we have extra!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is a waste of time and effort!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's make a bet on how many people we'll gather!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: KING KONG...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: GUM!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WHOTA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's not enough...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You are using too much brute strength...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That is "not enough"!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Amigasa Village- Bamboo Forest

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Zorojuro, I was told not to say the word SUNACCHI.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The geezers in my village used to say it back in the day... so it was something that I just picked up.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Before the Raid and World News storyline with 47 dialogue beats. The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
